name: FlowClaw Notion Trigger
description: v1.0: Schema v2 update — removed Type/Budget/GDPR/Phase/Role/etc. fields. Simplified Fastlane validation to Pre-Approved only. Updated Size mapping (Fastlane/Standard/Complex). Removed Medium task type entirely. Routing now based on Size field.

nodes.name: Notion Trigger - New Task
nodes.notes: Polls Notion Tasks DB (Schema v2) every minute for new tasks. Fields: Name, Status, Size, Project, Assigned To, Pre-Approved, Notes

nodes.name: Switch - Task Size Router
nodes.notes: v1.0: Routes by Size field (replaces Type). Output 0=Fastlane, 1=Standard, 2=Complex, 3=Unknown (fallback).

nodes.name: Log Unknown Task Size
nodes.notes: v1.0: Captures unknown/null task sizes and prepares alert.

nodes.name: Discord - Unknown Size Alert
nodes.notes: v1.0: Sends alert to #project_calls channel for manual review of unknown task sizes

nodes.name: Validate Fastlane Criteria
nodes.notes: v1.0: Simplified — only checks Pre-Approved checkbox. If true = valid Fastlane.

nodes.name: Downgrade to Standard
nodes.notes: v1.0: Fastlane criteria not met → downgrade Size to Standard

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({channelId: 'YOUR_CHANNEL_ID', message: '⚠️ **Fastlane Rejected**

Task: ' + ($json.Name || $json.name || 'Unknown') + '
Reason: Not pre-approved
Downgraded to Standard.'}) }}

parameters.jsCode:
// Create Fastlane Sub-Tasks (Schema v2)
const task = $input.first().json.task || $input.first().json;
const taskName = task.Name || task.name || 'Unnamed Task';

const subTasks = [
  {
    name: 'Concept: ' + taskName,
    phase: 'Concept',
    assignedTo: task['Assigned To'] || 'Engineering',
    mainTaskId: task.id,
    taskName: taskName,
    project: task.Project || '',
    isFastlane: true,
    taskSize: 'Fastlane'
  },
  {
    name: 'Design: ' + taskName,
    phase: 'Design',
    assignedTo: 'Design & Content',
    mainTaskId: task.id,
    taskName: taskName,
    project: task.Project || '',
    isFastlane: true,
    taskSize: 'Fastlane'
  },
  {
    name: 'Frontend: ' + taskName,
    phase: 'Frontend',
    assignedTo: 'Engineering',
    mainTaskId: task.id,
    taskName: taskName,
    project: task.Project || '',
    isFastlane: true,
    taskSize: 'Fastlane'
  },
  {
    name: 'QA: ' + taskName,
    phase: 'QA',
    assignedTo: 'Quality & Testing',
    mainTaskId: task.id,
    taskName: taskName,
    project: task.Project || '',
    isFastlane: true,
    taskSize: 'Fastlane'
  },
  {
    name: 'Deploy: ' + taskName,
    phase: 'Deploy',
    assignedTo: 'Infrastructure & Ops',
    mainTaskId: task.id,
    taskName: taskName,
    project: task.Project || '',
    isFastlane: true,
    taskSize: 'Fastlane'
  }
];

return subTasks.map(t => ({json: t}));

nodes.name: Create Fastlane Sub-Tasks
nodes.notes: v1.0: Creates Fastlane phase subtasks using Schema v2 field names (Size, Project, Assigned To as select)

nodes.name: Create Standard Sub-Tasks
nodes.notes: v1.0: Renamed from 'Create Simple Sub-Tasks'. Uses Standard size terminology.

nodes.name: Create Complex Sub-Tasks
nodes.notes: v1.0: Uses Schema v2 field names. Project from select field.

nodes.name: Execute via FlowClaw
nodes.notes: v1.0: workflowName from Map Workflow Name node. Uses taskSize instead of taskType.

nodes.name: Normalize Data
nodes.notes: v1.0: Updated for Schema v2. Project is now a select field (not relation). Size replaces Type.

nodes.name: Map Workflow Name
nodes.notes: v1.0: Maps Size to workflow. Fastlane→fastlane-deploy, Standard→simple-task, Complex→complex-task. Removed Medium.
